title: QA-QC Engineer
description:
Responsibilities

· Assist executing the Quality Assurance Plan, Inspection & Test Plans (ITPs), and project-specific quality procedures.

· Conduct inspections on civil, structural, architectural, mechanical, electrical, and fire protection system works during various stages of construction.

· Perform material inspections, monitor workmanship, and verify compliance with approved drawings and specifications.

· Monitor and document installation of systems critical to environmental control, such as high voltage, medium voltage, & low voltage, and HVAC systems.

· Raise and manage Non-Conformance Reports (NCRs) and ensure timely resolution through corrective and preventive actions.

· Coordinate with vendors, consultants, and third-party inspectors (if any) on quality-related issues.

· Support commissioning, validation, and system testing activities with clear documentation.

· Prepare daily/weekly QA/QC reports, maintain quality documentation and ensure proper record keeping for handover dossiers.

· Participate in internal & external quality audits and assist in preparing compliance documentation.

· Support punch list management, final inspections, and close-out documentation.


Requirements

· Degree/Diploma with at least 3 years of experience in project/engineering/construction management, preferably in data centre or critical environment.

· Familiarity with ITPs, method statements, and quality standards relevant to mission-critical infrastructure.

· Knowledge of MEP systems, HVAC, clean room classifications and standards is an advantage.

· Ability to read and interpret technical drawings, specifications, and codes.

· Certification in workplace safety (eg. WSQ, WSH) preferred.

· Positive proactive attitude and ethical behaviour.

· Team player with ability to work independently and resolve challenges in a fast-paced environment.

· Excellent interpersonal, communication and collaborative skills.

· Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Microsoft Word, Excel and PowerPoint).

postedCompany.description: Acme Associates Pte Ltd (ACME) offers Critical Infrastructure Lifecycle Solutions (CILS) for critical infrastructure like Data Centers, providing one-stop solution that includes Audit & Feasibility studies, Design & Build, Project Management and after sale support.
postedCompany.name: ACME ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD.
